items.title: Schedule urgent Series A follow-up with Lasse Andresen
items.context: Email from lasse.andresen@indykite.com on May 13: 'I would love to chat sooner rather than later. Eleven VC firms are currently reviewing our dataroom content, and we have 1 draft term sheet on the table.'

items.title: Review IndyKite attached materials (deck, customer traction plan, AgentControl doc)
items.context: Email from lasse.andresen@indykite.com on May 13 included attachments: IndyKite-2026-3.pdf, Customer Traction and Sales Plan 1H26.pdf, and AgentControl - IndyKite.pdf.

items.title: Coordinate SMBC follow-up to align on Opti messaging for Donna's AD management meeting
items.context: Email from ryo.ishii@smbcgroup.com on May 16: 'I'd love to circle back as we prepare for the upcoming AD management meeting, especially to align on the key messages for Donna.'

items.title: Schedule SMBC <> Opti CEO introduction
items.context: Email thread from May 6-16: Jake proposed introducing Opti CEO to SMBC's SV/Digital Strategy or CISO team. Ryo expressed interest. Logan offered to make the intro. No intro scheduled yet.

items.title: Review Prism Layer seed round pitch deck (v4)
items.context: Email from simone@prismlayer.ai on May 15: 'Just finished our seed round pitch deck. Talk soon!' Attached: PL Pitch Deck v4.pdf.

items.title: Prep for in-person meeting with Simone Garreau on May 26
items.context: Calendar event 'In-Person Meeting + Zoom | Simone Garreau (Prism Layer) + Fin Capital' on May 26 at Fin Capital offices (1 Sansome St). Attendees: Logan, Jake, Derek, Claire, Simone.

items.title: Follow up with Sai at Discern Security if no reply to Fan's outreach
items.context: Email from fan@fin.capital on May 18 to sai@discernsecurity.com: 'If you are open to a quick catch-up call, I would love to learn more about the latest developments.' No reply received yet.

items.title: Follow up on US Bank <> Echelon AI introduction
items.context: Email from meghan.kober@usbank.com on May 14 replying to Fan's intro of Eddie and Rahul (Echelon AI co-founders). Check if meeting has been scheduled between US Bank and Echelon.

items.title: Coordinate VanishID <> SMBC introduction
items.context: Email thread from May 6-16: Jake proposed VanishID to SMBC team. Ryo's analysis was 'very positive in terms of problem framing' and highlighted VanishID as aligned with how attackers operate today. No direct intro scheduled yet.

items.title: Prep for Security Breakfast with Thoropass on May 21
items.context: Calendar event 'Security Breakfast Prep - Fin Capital & Thoropass' on May 21 with claire.lamb@thoropass.com and javier@thoropass.com. Attendees include Lauren, Jackie, Derek, Jake.

items.title: Prep for GetReal investor briefing today
items.context: Calendar event 'GetReal & FinCapital | Investor Briefing' on May 20 with GetReal Labs team (Matt Moynahan, Jim, Varun Kohli, Hany, Mark). Attendees from Fin: Jake, Lissette, Derek.

items.title: Prep for US Bank security discussion on May 22
items.context: Calendar event 'US Bank Security Discussion' on May 22 with david.ridgway@usbank.com. Organizer: Derek. Attendee: Jake.
